presentation.summary: Build sports libraries from Sportarr league, season, and event metadata.
presentation.description_markdown: Maps Sportarr leagues to series, seasons to seasons, and events to episodes so sports libraries behave like familiar TV libraries in Silo. Legacy series metadata continues to use the default Sportarr hub. Movie metadata requires an explicitly configured local Sportarr base_url and is not available from the default hub. The provider is installed disabled by default so administrators can opt in where it fits their library layout.
presentation.setup_markdown: Install the plugin, then enable **Sportarr Metadata** in the metadata provider chain for the relevant sports library. Legacy series metadata uses the default hub unless you configure a different URL. Movie metadata requires an explicitly configured local Sportarr base_url; do not use the default hub for Movie metadata.

capabilities.description: Sportarr — metadata for sports leagues as TV shows.

fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Sportarr instance URL. Series metadata defaults to https://sportarr.net; Movie metadata requires a local Sportarr base_url.
